query:
SELECT m.lineDescription, m.matchedItemName, m.confidence, m.matchMethod FROM invoiceLineItemMatches m WHERE m.invoiceId BETWEEN 60012 AND 60131 AND m.inventoryItemId IS NOT NULL;
SELECT DISTINCT m.lineDescription FROM invoiceLineItemMatches m WHERE m.invoiceId BETWEEN 60012 AND 60131 AND m.inventoryItemId IS NULL LIMIT 30;
